title: pomazota capitata
intro: Pomazota capitata, also known as the "butterfly flower," is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. Its medicinal properties are derived from its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pomazota capitata include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Pomazota capitata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, with some traditional preparations also involving the use of the plant's leaves in topical applications.
